texto: At the bottom of a good deal of the bravery that appears in the world there lurks a miserable cowardice. Men will face powder and steel because they cannot face public opinion.
explicacao: Citação de E. H. Chapin sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “At the bottom of a good deal of the bravery that appears in the world there lurks a miserable cow…” articula coragem, bravery, bottom em registro de coragem, com relevância para contextos como bravery.
